items.prompt: Canonical SOP includes minterms where F equals…
items.explain: SOP ORs products for rows where F is 1.

items.prompt: Canonical POS includes maxterms where F equals…
items.explain: POS ANDs sums for rows where F is 0.
m0 is the 00 row: A' AND B'.

items.prompt: Canonical SOP is always the minimal expression.
items.explain: Canonical forms list every minterm/maxterm; minimization may shrink them.
